overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War showing Kratos exploring a snowy Norse realm at night. The character walks around a mystical outdoor area with a large tree adorned with glowing orbs, then enters a wooden house containing an enormous interior tree and a dwarven workshop.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy outdoor realm with mystical tree and Norse house

events.description: Kratos turns toward the mystical tree and approaches the glowing orbs

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking around the exterior, observing the mystical tree with glowing orbs and the surrounding snowy landscape

notable_agents.action: frozen creature or statue visible near the house entrance briefly

entered.detail: traditional Norse architecture with golden roof accents and intricate wood carvings
massive tree with glowing red, green, blue, and purple orbs hanging from branches
snow-covered wooden walkway surrounding the house
tall carved stone post with golden bindings
carved wooden fence and gate structure

segments.scene_description: Kratos explores a snowy exterior realm at night, walking around a traditional Norse house with golden accents. He approaches a massive mystical tree adorned with colorful glowing orbs hanging from its branches, set against a purple starry sky.

events.description: Kratos opens the large wooden door and enters the house, transitioning from snowy exterior to dimly lit interior

agents.ego_description: Kratos approaching the house entrance, opening the heavy wooden door, and stepping inside

entered.detail: large carved wooden door with metal bindings and golden decorative elements
massive tree trunk visible inside the house, glowing with ethereal light

segments.scene_description: Kratos walks up to the house entrance and opens the large carved wooden door. The scene transitions from the snowy exterior to a dimly lit interior space, revealing a massive glowing tree growing through the center of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior workshop with massive tree and forge

events.description: Kratos approaches the workbench area where a dwarf is working at the forge

agents.ego_description: Kratos walking around the interior, examining the massive tree growing through the house, the workshop area, and approaching the window overlooking the snowy landscape

notable_agents.action: dwarf working at the forge near the workbench

entered.detail: long wooden workbench with tools and glowing forge nearby
lit forge with fire and blacksmithing equipment
wooden shelves lined with various items and artifacts
large arched window with intricate wooden frame overlooking the snowy exterior

segments.scene_description: Inside the house, Kratos explores a spacious workshop built around a massive glowing tree. A dwarf works at a forge near a central workbench. The interior features wooden architecture with golden accents, shelves of artifacts, and a large window offering a view of the snowy landscape outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a mystical, snowy exterior at night into the warm, industrious interior of a dwarven workshop. It begins with Kratos navigating a frozen realm under a purple starry sky, passing a traditional Norse house to approach a massive tree adorned with colorful glowing orbs. As he reaches the entrance, the camera follows him through a large carved wooden door, transitioning from the cold night air into a dimly lit indoor space. The scene then expands to reveal a spacious workshop built around another enormous glowing tree that pierces through the center of the building. Finally, the camera glides past a dwarf working at a forge and shelves of artifacts, moving through the golden-accented wooden architecture toward a large window that looks back out onto the snowy landscape.
